title: eriophyllum wallacei
intro: Eriophyllum wallacei, also known as Wright's woolly sunflower or California fleabane, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Eriophyllum wallacei have been reported to provide relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Eriophyllum wallacei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
